title: lyonia stahlii
intro: Lyonia stahlii, also known as Stahli's lyonia or mountain holly, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lyonia stahlii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Lyonia stahlii often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
